title: Kodaikanal Solar Observatory (KoSO) White-Light Sunspot Regions Masks (1904-2017)
summary: White-light sunspot region masks from Kodaikanal Solar Observatory spanning 1904 to 2017.

title: A Unified Sunspot Group Dataset (RGO/SOON/NOAA) from 1874 to Present
summary: Unified sunspot group dataset combining RGO, SOON, and NOAA records from 1874 onward.
